Notes: Hamilton junior Holly Erick led the Continentals to a UCAA victory, scoring
15 points and grabbing seven rebounds.  RPI junior Kristin Kaczynski paced the
Red Hawks, also scoring 15 points.  Rensselaer returns to conference action
tomorrow at home against William Smith, while Hamilton travels to Vassar.
